_fixture_note: Hand-authored, FAITHFUL ReviewOutcome captures (SPEC-05 T5) — not a live LLM recording. Grounded in the real ReviewOutcome shape returned by reviewer-core's reviewPullRequest (src/review/run.ts). Simulates a DEGRADED/broken system prompt (e.g. a stripped-down or misdirected instruction) reviewing the SAME two cases as good-prompt.outcome.json: it misses the path-traversal finding entirely (must_find case) and flags the safe, already-sanitized constant as a false positive (must_not_flag case). Synthetic diff/content only; no secrets or proprietary code.

review.summary: Minor style nit on the assets root constant; no other issues found.

findings.title: Consider making the assets root configurable via environment variable
findings.rationale: The static `ASSETS_ROOT` constant is hardcoded; making it configurable would improve flexibility across environments.
findings.suggestion: Read `ASSETS_ROOT` from config/env instead of a literal.
